title: Xof
description:
The Xof mod is based on this YT post 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c2OO-TRuvDQ
body: This mod makes foxes spin in a circle when music is played in a jukebox and play the [YT Video's audio](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c2OO-TRuvDQ) instead of the expected record's music, music not included in jar file, streamed at runtime, file size is big because of natives.
